results.requirement_text: The system shall load the project dashboard within three seconds for 95 percent of requests.

test_cases.title: Project dashboard load time performance
test_cases.objective: Verify that the project dashboard loads within three seconds for at least 95 percent of requests.
test_cases.technique_used: Load testing with response time measurement
preconditions: Configured measurement approach and representative operating conditions are available.

steps.action: Exercise the configured capability by measuring the load time of the project dashboard under a representative load.
steps.expected_result: Measured load time is ≤ 3 seconds for at least 95% of requests.

test_cases.expected_result: Project dashboard load time ≤ 3 seconds for ≥ 95% of requests.
